title: Liberal construction
doc_html:
§130.848.  Liberal construction

This Subpart, being necessary for the welfare of the state, the city, and their residents, shall be liberally construed to effect the purposes thereof.

Acts 2011, No. 205, §1, eff. June 24, 2011.
